title: ATOMIC dispatch flip + dedupe helper + SSRF bank patch

taint.rs.doc_comment_updated: Added RUST-VULN-TAINT-PIPELINE-V1 M2 rationale + extract_call_name_rust shape note
taint.rs.loc_delta: +11 -0 = net +11 LOC (additive only — bank_addition_additive_only mandate satisfied)

diff_summary.total_loc_delta: +67 -25 = net +42 LOC (within plan estimate of +30 to +50)

atomic_commit_rationale: Splitting creates intermediate states with regressions: (a) dispatch flip without SSRF bank patch leaves rust_ssrf_positive RED (canonical pipeline runs but bank gap blocks sink detection); (b) bank patch without dispatch flip is dead code unreachable for .rs; (c) dispatch flip without dedupe produces 2x CommandInjection findings on overlapping lines. Single atomic commit prevents all three intermediate states from existing as a SHA in the history.

test_baseline_pre_post_m2.vuln_migration_v1_red_post_m2: 167/168 GREEN (+4 RED→GREEN: rust_command_injection_positive, rust_deserialization_positive, rust_path_traversal_positive, rust_ssrf_positive)
test_baseline_pre_post_m2.remaining_red: cpp_deserialization_positive (out-of-scope Bucket B; closes in var-extract-nested-constructor-v1 follow-on)

premortem_stress_test_cases_verified_in_.case_1_same_line_same_vuln_collapses: verified via FIXTURE-1 — line-scanner CommandInjection at line 6 dropped by predicate
premortem_stress_test_cases_verified_in_.case_2_different_line_same_vuln_keeps_2: documented as FIXTURE-2 limitation (multi-line chain — neither layer emits in this construction)
premortem_stress_test_cases_verified_in_.case_3_same_line_different_vuln_keeps_2: verified via FIXTURE-3 — UnsafeCode (line scanner) preserved alongside CommandInjection (canonical) on line 6

wildcard_get_post_m2_carry_forward.issue: RUST_AST_SINKS HttpRequest pattern ("*", "get") is now LIVE on .rs files post-dispatch-flip. Pre-M2 it was dead code (early-return blocked .rs from canonical). M3-binary-smoke quantifies FP rate at 100% on synthetic non-HTTP-client .get(<tainted>) callers (HashMap::get, Vec::get, BTreeMap::get).
